creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
On FreeBSD b1.hs 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #0 r323607M: Fri Sep 15 19:12:31 AEST 2017 i386 1101503 1101503

# make -C /usr/ports/databases/rrdtool package fails with 
===>   Registering installation for rrdtool-1.7.0 as automatic
...
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
===>  Installing for rrdtool-1.7.0
pkg-static: Unable to access file /var/ports/usr/ports/databases/rrdtool/work/stage/usr/local/share/locale/hu/LC_MESSAGES/rrdtool.mo: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Removing rrdtool.mo from pkg-plist enables the package to be built.
